basic_details.job_title: DMSRDE Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE)
basic_details.short_information: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DRDO. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DMSRDE Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates (OBC creamy layer not eligible)

qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in relevant discipline (basic sciences) in first division with NET qualification OR Graduate degree in professional course (B.E./B.Tech.) in relevant discipline in first division with NET/GATE OR Post graduate degree in professional course (M.E./M.Tech.) in relevant discipline in first division both at Graduate and Post graduate level

all_official_links.label: Download DMSRDE Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the DMSRDE Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow post at DMSRDE is scheduled for 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to attend on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Post Graduate degree in a relevant basic science discipline with NET qualification, or a Graduate degree in a professional course (B.E./B.Tech.) with NET/GATE, or a Post Graduate degree in a professional course (M.E./M.Tech.) with first division at both graduate and post-graduate levels.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the DMSRDE Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to perform well in the interview to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for DMSRDE Junior Research Fellow going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE) office in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of their ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Research Fellow position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Does DMSRDE offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, DMSRDE offers age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates. However, OBC creamy layer candidates are not eligible for this relaxation.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the DMSRDE Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow post at DMSRDE is scheduled for 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to attend on this date with all necessary documents.
